title: Any Way You Want It
why_this_song: Any Way You Want It by Journey (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 29 times; first heard in: "Any way you want it"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "That's the way you need it"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "That's the way you need it"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "So hold tight, hold tight"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Ooh, all night, all night"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "that's" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She said any way you want it

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Any Way You Want It" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Any Way You Want It" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Any Way You Want It" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Any Way You Want It"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Journey one question about "Any Way You Want It", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Journey sobre "Any Way You Want It", o que seria e por quê?
